title: Pink Style CPVP Pack 16x
description: This is a Minecraft Texture pack made for cpvp it contains Crystals and other in a pink style
body:
This Pack adds Follwing Things
recolored Blocks
recolored Items
new item Models
everything in a Pink Style
If you want a new experience while playing and like the color pink this is a great texturepack for you ! it revamps the color of the Crystal pvp Items and gives them a new look
